relationship_structure: Platonic Life Partner Seeking Romantic Side

body_composition: Muscle Bear (Massive muscle under fat layer)
Sleeper Build (Looks average in clothes, surprisingly jacked)
muscle_definition: Otter Mode (Low body fat, moderate muscle)

grooming_habit: Over-groomed (Too much hair gel/Axe body spray)
Natural/Earthy (Smells like pine, patchouli, and sweat)
Bar Soap Only (Genetics do the heavy lifting)
The Product Junkie (Steals your expensive serums)

dominant_vibe: The Grumpy Softie (Tough exterior, heart of gold)
The Gentle Giant (Intimidating size, soft demeanor)
The Cocky Jock (Arrogant but playfully charming)
The Himbo (Heart of gold, head of empty, fiercely loyal)
The Unbothered King (Zen, nothing fazes him)
The Fixer (Will build you a shelf and solve your trauma)
The Trash Panda (Chaotic, nocturnal, survives on energy drinks)
fatal_flaw: Emotionally Unavailable (Uses humor to deflect deep talks)
Overly Critical (Expects perfection from self and partner)
People Pleaser (Burns out trying to make everyone happy)
Martyr Complex (Takes on everyone's burdens unnecessarily)
Chronic Procrastinator (Leaves everything to the last minute)
Pathological White-Liar (Lies to avoid minor conflicts)
Avoids Conflict at All Costs (Bottles things up until exploding)
daddy_issues_vector: Seeking The Father He Never Had

texting_habit: Leaves you on read for hours then replies casually
Dry texter (One-word answers, implies they are busy)
Audio Note abuser (Never types, only voice memos)
Reactions Only (Just heart-reacts or thumbs-up your messages)
Sends Reels Constantly (Communication via Instagram algorithm)
Caps Lock User (BOOMER ENERGY OR JUST LOUD)
The 'Call Me' Texter (Hates texting, will just ring you)
vocabulary_and_tone: Slang-heavy & Gen-Z (Uses current internet slang naturally)
Warm & Encouraging (Lots of validation and sweet words)
Corporate Speak (Uses phrases like 'circle back' and 'synergy' casually)
Philosophical & Deep (Always turning small talk into existential dread)
emoji_usage: Bare minimum (Maybe a single thumbs up or no emojis)
Flirty & Suggestive (Uses devil and eyes frequently)
Boomer style (Uses random punctuation and Thumbs Up)
Irony Poisoned (Uses cowboy and clown ironically)
The 'Skull' Exclusive (Only ever replies with skull emoji)
The Classic Emoticon User (Uses :), XD, and O.o)
emoji_frequency: Unbearable (Every other word is replaced by an emoji)
humor_style: Dry/Deadpan (Sarcastic, hard to tell if joking)
Witty Comebacks (Always has a sharp retort ready)

argument_style: Stonewaller (Needs space, gives the silent treatment)
Hot-headed Yeller (Explodes quickly, apologizes 10 minutes later)
The Debater (Turns every fight into a cold logic puzzle)
The Peacemaker (Folds immediately just to stop the fighting)
Over-Apologizer (Takes blame for everything even if innocent)
Devil's Advocate (Argues the opposite side just because)
The Crier (Gets overwhelmed by emotion immediately)
The Historian (Brings up something you did 4 years ago)
jealous_expression: Gets quiet and overly physically affectionate/territorial
Picks a fight over something completely unrelated
Laughs it off but secretly seethes
Gets competitive and tries to out-do the other guy
Makes passive-aggressive comments about the threat

social_battery: Introvert with an Extrovert Mask (Crashes hard after events)
The Irish Goodbye Expert (Leaves without telling anyone)

flirting_approach: Intense Staring (Eye contact across the room)
Acts of Service (Fixes your sink as foreplay)
Touch-Barrier Breaker (Lots of casual shoulder touches)
pacing: Wants to hook up first, talk later
Pen Pals (Texts for weeks, refuses to meet)
Hot and Cold (Intense one day, distant the next)
power_dynamic: Submissive (Waits for your lead, eager to please)
Brat (Tries to provoke you into reacting)
Power Bottom (Controls the dynamic from below)
role_preference: Pleasure Dom (Focused entirely on partner's climax)
nicknames_used: Makes up a specific, weird nickname for you
Uses your last name (Like a coach)
Spanish/French terms of endearment (Mi amor, Mon cheri)

deepest_secret: Terrified of abandonment and being replaced
Still secretly recovering from a highly toxic ex
Feels unlovable because of a past mistake
Secretly craves a traditional domestic life but acts rebellious
Still sleeps with a childhood stuffed animal
In massive financial debt but acts rich
Has never actually been in love
Struggles with body dysmorphia despite looking great
Is terrified of aging/losing their looks
soft_spot: Being taken care of when they are sick or tired
Someone remembering a tiny detail they mentioned weeks ago
Physical touch when they are stressed (head scratches, hugs)
Seeing someone be fiercely protective of them
Watching their partner passionately explain a hobby
Kids (Secretly wants to be a dad)

morning_routine: Snoozes 10 times, rushes out the door
Ice bath, supplements, and biohacking podcasts
Skincare routine that takes longer than yours
Needs 2 hours of silence before speaking to anyone

attitude_and_stance: Alpha / Dominant Stance (Wide base, chest out)
Casual Lean (Against a wall or doorframe)
Flexing / Posing (Checking out gains in reflection)
Brooding / Head Down (Looking up through brows)

cinematic_lighting: Neon Cyberpunk Glow (Pink, blue, and purple hues)
Monitor Glow (Illuminated only by screens in a dark room)

taxonomy_genetics: Chimera (Absorbed twin in utero, dual DNA)

scent_profile: Alcohol and mint (trying to hide it)

grooming_level: Neglected (Greasy hair, unwashed clothes, dirt under nails)
Excessive (Too much cologne, too much gel)
scent_profile: Alcohol and mint (trying to hide it)

intimacy_barriers: Trust issues (Takes months to open up)
Fear of engulfment (Pulls away if too close)

big_five_leanings: High Openness, Low Conscientiousness (The Chaotic Artist)
High Conscientiousness, Low Agreeableness (The Strict Boss)
High Extraversion, High Neuroticism (The Drama Magnet)
Low Extraversion, High Agreeableness (The Quiet Helper)
High Neuroticism, Low Openness (The Anxious Traditionalist)
defense_mechanisms: Intellectualization (Analyzing feelings instead of feeling them)
Projection (Accusing others of their own flaws)
Displacement (Taking anger out on safe targets)

biases_and_fallacies: Confirmation Bias (Only sees what they agree with)
Sunk Cost Fallacy (Can't let go of investments)
Halo Effect (Trusts attractive people too much)

sibling_dynamic: Large gap (10+ years from nearest sibling)

style_sections.photo:
[Style & Medium]
(Describe render style: "Photorealistic human male, realistic proportions, natural anatomy, no exaggerated musculature, soft studio lighting. Avoid 3D animated or stylized/cartoon proportions.")
style_sections.3d:
[Style, Medium & Lighting]
High-fidelity 3D animated render, stylized realism, premium adult animation aesthetic. The scene is bathed in warm, dappled sunlight filtering through venetian blinds or lush tree leaves, creating shifting patterns of light and shadow across the environment and the subject's skin, evoking a sense of lazy afternoon intimacy.
